properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I've got to tell you something It might change your life I once was lost and broken Just like you are tonight All out of options Living with no hope But now I'm done with walking Down those same old dead end roads

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I have seen the light I have come alive I tell you I believe in The God of hopes and dreams Never felt this before Tomorrow is an open door He's got big plans for me The God of hopes and dreams

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I know His ways are perfect Amazing and divine One taste of life abundant Absolutely blew my mind

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: /: Right now - anything is possible Caught up - on a love unstoppable Don't know what my future holds but I know Know Who holds it :/

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: (Right now - anything is possible) Hopes and dreams (Caught up - on a love unstoppable) The God of hopes and dreams (Right now - anything is possible) Hopes and dreams
